dialogos.texto_en: (The art museum exhibited contemporary artworks by artists\n associated with Okinawa.)
(There were also huge sculptures placed outdoors,\n and we all enjoyed the art to a great extent.)
(However, I couldn't fully concentrate on the tour.)
(During breaks, I asked the other quintuplets\n about Miku.)
(But, it was unsuccesful. Everyone thinks something\n is wrong with how Miku's acting, but no one\n has any reason why.)
(After finishing the museum tour, it was already\n evening, and we enjoyed a luxurious dinner\n as planned, before returning to the hotel.)
*sigh*
(They told me that they don't know what's going on,\n but they also said that its unlikely\n Miku has any negative feelings towards me.)
(I knew that, but to be honest,\n it was a relief, hearing it from her sisters.)
(And Miku, the person in question, was still the same\n during the museum tour.)
(Sometimes, she spoke to me as she usually would.)
(And, if I replied, she would smile happily.)
(But, whenever I try to initiate a conversation.)
(She suddenly starts stumbling on her\n words, blushing...)
(Strangely distancing herself, or even trying to run away.)
(...What the hell is going on?)
Uesugi-kun.
Why are you standing here, lost in your thoughts?
Itsuki...\nYotsuba and Raiha as well.
You didn't go back to your room? You've been here all this time?
That room is too big. I can't relax there.
Huh? It's even more spacious in here, no?
No, I didn't mean it in terms of space...\nWhatever, don't worry about it.
So, what do you want?
Huh?
You guys gathered and came all this way to the lobby.\nYou came looking for me\nbecause I wasn't in my room, right?
So you already know why we are here, don't you?\nEveryone is worried about you and Miku.
Well, I guess that's natural.
Ahh!\nDon't make that face.\nWe're not blaming you.
...Did my face look that scary?
Yeah, it's a face I've never seen before.\nAre you okay, big bro?
Honestly, I can't say that I am...
Actually...\nI had a little talk with Miku at the museum.
What?
Huh? I can't believe you're actually discussing this topic\nwith me, big bro.
That just goes to show how much you care about Miku, right?
Oh, I see.\nYou're also struggling with love, huh, big bro.
Actually...\nI talked a little with Miku at the museum.
What?
To me, it seemed like she was wanting to be with you,\nbut there was a reason she couldn't.
A reason she couldn't?\nWhat could that be?
I didn't ask her directly,\nbut that's just how I felt,\nso I don't know for sure.
I see...
So she wants to get along,\nbut there's a reason she can't...\nWhat could the reason be?
Well, if it were me, it would be something \nlike having a fight with a friend and wanting to\nmake up, but not being able to find a way to do so.
Oh, I totally get that!
But, Miku and Uesugi-kun\nnever fought before...
We haven't. If we had, Miku wouldn't be avoiding me\nlike this. If that were the case, I would've acted\na long time ago and apologized.
Miku does have a stubborn side though...
Even if they fought,\nI also don't think she would avoid Uesugi-san like this.
...It doesn't seem like we're getting anywhere\nby just thinking about it.
Anyway, the only solution\nis to talk to Miku directly.
I'm sure Miku herself would like\nto resolve this situation.
That may be true, but if I try to talk to her,\nshe'll just run away.
How about creating a situation\nwhere Miku would feel comfortable talking?
A comfortable situation?
For example...
I know! How about inviting Miku and Uesugi-san\nto a place where they have fond memories?
That way, they could start with reminiscing\nabout their memories\nand create a comfortable atmosphere to talk.
Oh, that's a good idea!
Wait a minute. That's not possible.
Why?
We're in Okinawa right now, remember?
Ah, that's right.
Ahaha, true that.\nRather, we're going to make memories from now on,\naren't we?
I'm sorry, Uesugi-san.\nI might've said something off-topic.
...No, that's actually a great idea.
Huh? Really?
Yeah. That's a great idea!\nI'm gonna go someplace memorable for both Miku and I tomorrow!
Huh?\nWhat are you talking about, big bro?
